extension.description: Orion v3.2.0 - Complete media addon with 15+ torrent scrapers (Torrentio, PirateBay, YTS, EZTV, 1337x, Knaben, TorrentGalaxy, SolidTorrents, BTDig, LimeTorrents, Nyaa, Comet, MediaFusion, Jackettio, Orionoid), Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, Trakt integration, ResolveURL 5.1.193, watch history, favorites, Kids Zone, auto-play next episode.
extension.news: [3.2.0] Updated ResolveURL to v5.1.193 (latest from Gujal). Added 10 new torrent scrapers: PirateBay API, YTS, EZTV, Knaben, TorrentGalaxy, SolidTorrents, BTDig, LimeTorrents, Nyaa, Comet. Added Gujal repository for auto-updates. All scrapers enabled by default.
